TRIBE v2: A Brain Predictive Foundation Model
March 26, 2026

Meta FAIR introduces TRIBE v2, an open-source foundation model for predicting brain activity (fMRI responses) from images and video. Trained on large-scale fMRI datasets, TRIBE v2 enables researchers and developers to decode how visual stimuli activate different brain regions. Weights and inference code are freely available on HuggingFace and GitHub.

Llama 4: Multimodal Intelligence at Scale
March 10, 2026

Today we are releasing Llama 4, our most capable open-source multimodal model. Llama 4 supports text, image, audio and video inputs and is available on HuggingFace under the Llama Community License.

SeamlessStreaming v2: Real-Time Speech Translation
February 14, 2026

Meta AI releases SeamlessStreaming v2 with improved latency and support for 36 languages. Available on HuggingFace under CC-BY-NC 4.0.
